title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Lodha & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha & Co are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!
